alert.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

kanban.description: A replacement for your IDE better suited for running many agents in parallel and reviewing diffs. Enable auto-commit and link cards together to create dependency chains that complete large amounts of work autonomously.

markdownBlock.clickToToggleActMode: Click to toggle to Act Mode

telemetry.title: Help Improve Cline
telemetry.subtitle: (and access experimental features)
telemetry.description: Cline collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. No code, prompts, or personal information is ever sent.
telemetry.youCanTurnOff: You can turn this setting off in

checkpoint.restoreTaskAndWorkspaceDesc: Restores the task and your project's files back to a snapshot taken at this point
checkpoint.restoreTaskOnlyDesc: Deletes messages after this point (does not affect workspace)
checkpoint.restoreWorkspaceOnlyDesc: Restores your project's files to a snapshot taken at this point (task may become out of sync)
checkpoint.restoreFilesAndTaskDesc: Revert files and clear messages after this point

addLocalServer.description: Add a local MCP server by configuring it in
addLocalServer.descriptionSuffix: . You'll need to specify the server name, command, arguments, and any required environment variables in the JSON configuration. Learn more

addRemoteServer.description: Add a remote MCP server by providing a name and its URL endpoint. Learn more

configureView.protocolDescription: enables communication with locally running MCP servers that provide additional tools and resources to extend Cline's capabilities. You can use
configureView.protocolDescriptionSuffix: or ask Cline to create new tools specific to your workflow (e.g., "add a tool that gets the latest npm docs").
configureView.orgManages: Your organization manages some MCP servers

serverRow.cantDisable: This server can't be disabled because it is enabled by your organization

marketplace.name: Name
marketplace.orgPreconfigured: Your organization has pre-configured the available MCP servers
marketplace.noMarketplace: No MCP servers found in the marketplace
marketplace.submitDescription: Help others discover great MCP servers by submitting an issue to

chatDisplay.somethingWrongImage: Something went wrong displaying this image
chatDisplay.somethingWrongLink: Something went wrong displaying this link preview
chatDisplay.failedToFetchOpenGraph: Failed to fetch Open Graph data

worktrees.title: Worktrees
worktrees.description: Git worktrees let you work on multiple branches at the same time, each in its own folder. Open worktrees in their own windows so Cline can work on multiple tasks in parallel.
worktrees.fileToAutoCopy: file to automatically copy files like
worktrees.toNewWorktrees: to new worktrees, so you don't have to reinstall dependencies.
worktrees.multiFolderDesc: Worktrees are not supported when multiple folders are open in the same workspace. Please open a single repository folder to use this feature.
worktrees.subfolderDesc: You have a subfolder open instead of the repository root. Please open the root folder to use worktrees:
worktrees.requireGit: Worktrees require a git repository. Please initialize git to use worktrees.

errors.failedToCreateTask: Failed to create task for Cline

worktrees.primaryTooltip: The original worktree where your .git directory lives.
worktrees.currentTooltip: This is the worktree currently open in this window.

create.title: Create New Worktree
create.description: This will create a copy of your project on a new branch.
create.descriptionOpen: This will create a copy of your project on a new branch and open in a separate window.
create.branchNameHint: Your new copy will be checked out to this branch.
create.folderPathHint: Where the project will be copied for the worktree.

delete.title: Delete Worktree
delete.description: This will delete the worktree directory at
delete.warningUnpushed: Warning: Unpushed commits on this branch will be lost.

rules.rulesDescription: Rules allow you to provide Cline with system-level guidance. Think of them as a persistent way to include context and preferences for your projects or globally for every conversation.
rules.workflowsDescription: Workflows allow you to define a series of steps to guide Cline through a repetitive set of tasks, such as deploying a service or submitting a PR. To invoke a workflow, type
rules.skillsDescription: Skills are reusable instruction sets that Cline can activate on-demand. When a task matches a skill's description, Cline uses the
rules.skillsTool: tool to load the full instructions.
rules.hooksDescription: Hooks allow you to execute custom scripts at specific points in Cline's execution lifecycle, enabling automation and integration with external tools.
rules.hookWindowsToggle: On Windows, hooks execute whenever the hook file exists.
rules.hookWindowsWarning: Hook toggling is not yet supported on Windows in this foundation PR. Hooks can be created, edited, and deleted, and execute whenever the hook file exists. Coming next: JSON-backed hook enabled/disabled state across platforms.
rules.hookTogglingNotSupported: Hook toggling is not yet supported on Windows in this foundation PR. Hooks execute when the hook file exists.

hookTypes.taskStart: Executes when a new task begins
hookTypes.taskResume: Executes when a task is resumed
hookTypes.taskCancel: Executes when a task is cancelled
hookTypes.preToolUse: Executes before any tool is used
hookTypes.postToolUse: Executes after any tool is used
hookTypes.userPromptSubmit: Executes when user submits a prompt

newRule.chooseHookType: Choose a hook type to create. Hooks execute at specific points in Cline's lifecycle. Available:
newRule.skillNameInvalid: Skill name can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores
newRule.extensionInvalid: Only .md, .txt, or no file extension allowed

ruleRow.agentsTooltip: Searches recursively for all AGENTS.md files in the workspace when a top-level AGENTS.md exists
ruleRow.ruleRequired: This rule is required and cannot be disabled
